title: An Account of the People of the Lowlands (ahl al-sawdd
description: According to al-Sari - Shucayb - Sayf - `Abd al-Malik b. `UmayrQabigah b. Jabir: A man from among us recited on the Day of alQadisiyyah, when victory was attained: We were fighting until God granted His victory,

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 12
